---
title: "Application Form"
subtitle: "3rd SARA Summer School 2026 — R for Researchers"
date: "2026-04-14"
author: "SARA Organising Team"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: cosmo
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: article
    title-block-banner: "#1e3a5f"
    title-block-banner-color: "#ffffff"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.6; }

/* ── Back link ── */
.back-link {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  font-size: 13px; color: #2e6cb0; text-decoration: none;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem; padding: 6px 0;
}
.back-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

/* ── Deadline notice ── */
.notice {
  background: #fff8ec; border-left: 3px solid #e5a82a;
  padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0;
  font-size: 13px; color: #7a5200; margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.notice strong { display: block; margin-bottom: 3px; font-size: 13px; }

/* ── Section heading ── */
.form-section-title {
  font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .12em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: #888;
  margin: 2rem 0 1rem; padding-bottom: 8px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
}

/* ── Fields ── */
.field-group { margin-bottom: 18px; }
.field-group label {
  display: block; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500;
  color: #333; margin-bottom: 5px;
}
.field-group label .req { color: #d94040; margin-left: 2px; }
.field-group input[type=text],
.field-group input[type=email],
.field-group input[type=tel],
.field-group select,
.field-group textarea {
  width: 100%; padding: 9px 12px;
  border: 1px solid #d5d5d5; border-radius: 7px;
  font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  color: #1a1a1a; background: #fafafa;
  transition: border-color .2s, box-shadow .2s; outline: none;
}
.field-group input:focus,
.field-group select:focus,
.field-group textarea:focus {
  border-color: #2e6cb0;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(46,108,176,.1);
  background: #fff;
}
.field-group textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 88px; }
.field-group .hint { font-size: 11px; color: #aaa; margin-top: 4px; }

/* ── Two-column row ── */
.row-2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }

/* ── Radio & checkbox options ── */
.radio-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
.radio-option {
  display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px;
  padding: 11px 14px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer;
  transition: border-color .15s, background .15s;
}
.radio-option:hover { border-color: #2e6cb0; background: #f5f9ff; }
.radio-option input[type=radio] { margin-top: 2px; accent-color: #2e6cb0; flex-shrink: 0; }
.radio-option .opt-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #1a1a1a; }
.radio-option .opt-desc  { font-size: 12px; color: #888; margin-top: 1px; }

.check-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
.check-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  font-size: 14px; color: #444; cursor: pointer;
}
.check-item input { accent-color: #2e6cb0; }

/* ── Funded extra section ── */
.funded-section {
  background: #edf7f0; border: 1px solid #9dd8b5;
  border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; margin-top: 16px; display: none;
}
.funded-section.show { display: block; }
.funded-section-title {
  font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a6b3e;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .08em; margin-bottom: 14px;
}

/* ── Divider ── */
hr.form-divider { border: none; border-top: 1px solid #eee; margin: 28px 0; }

/* ── Refund box ── */
.refund-box {
  background: #f5f4f0; border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 15px 18px; font-size: 13px; color: #555; margin-bottom: 22px;
}
.refund-box strong { color: #1e3a5f; display: block; margin-bottom: 4px; }

/* ── Submit ── */
.submit-area { text-align: center; padding-top: 6px; }
.btn-submit {
  background: #1e3a5f; color: #fff; font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 15px; padding: 13px 48px; border: none;
  border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  transition: background .2s;
}
.btn-submit:hover { background: #162c4a; }
.submit-note { font-size: 12px; color: #aaa; margin-top: 10px; }

/* ── Success message (hidden until submit) ── */
.success-msg {
  display: none; background: #edf7f0; border: 1px solid #4caf81;
  border-radius: 10px; padding: 28px 32px; text-align: center; margin-top: 1rem;
}
.success-msg h3 { color: #1a6b3e; font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.success-msg p  { color: #444; font-size: 14px; }

/* ── Responsive ── */
@media (max-width: 520px) {
  .row-2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<a href="SARA_SS3_Announcement.html" class="back-link">← Back to announcement</a>

<div class="notice">
  <strong>Deadlines at a glance</strong>
  Early bird (40% off): <strong>30 April 2026</strong> &nbsp;·&nbsp;
  Funded seats: <strong>31 May 2026</strong> &nbsp;·&nbsp;
  Regular: <strong>15 June 2026</strong>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!--  FORM                                                      -->
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<form id="appForm" action="https://formspree.io/f/xnjolgjr" method="POST">

  <!-- Section 1: Personal information -->
  <div class="form-section-title">1 · Personal information</div>

  <div class="row-2">
    <div class="field-group">
      <label>First name <span class="req">*</span></label>
      <input type="text" name="first_name" placeholder="e.g. Priya" required>
    </div>
    <div class="field-group">
      <label>Last name <span class="req">*</span></label>
      <input type="text" name="last_name" placeholder="e.g. Kumar" required>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="field-group">
    <label>Email address <span class="req">*</span></label>
    <input type="email" name="email" placeholder="you@institution.ac.in" required>
    <div class="hint">All communications will be sent here. Use your institutional email if possible.</div>
  </div>

  <div class="row-2">
    <div class="field-group">
      <label>Phone number <span class="req">*</span></label>
      <input type="tel" name="phone" placeholder="+91 98765 43210" required>
    </div>
    <div class="field-group">
      <label>Gender</label>
      <select name="gender">
        <option value="">Select…</option>
        <option>Male</option>
        <option>Female</option>
        <option>Non-binary / other</option>
        <option>Prefer not to say</option>
      </select>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr class="form-divider">

  <!-- Section 2: Academic background -->
  <div class="form-section-title">2 · Academic &amp; professional background</div>

  <div class="field-group">
    <label>Current affiliation (institution / organisation) <span class="req">*</span></label>
    <input type="text" name="institution" placeholder="e.g. Panjab University, Chandigarh" required>
  </div>

  <div class="row-2">
    <div class="field-group">
      <label>Designation / role <span class="req">*</span></label>
      <select name="designation" required>
        <option value="">Select…</option>
        <option>PhD Student</option>
        <option>Postdoctoral Researcher</option>
        <option>Research Scholar / JRF / SRF</option>
        <option>Assistant Professor</option>
        <option>Associate / Full Professor</option>
        <option>Master's Student</option>
        <option>Research Analyst / Professional</option>
        <option>Other</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div class="field-group">
      <label>Discipline / field of study <span class="req">*</span></label>
      <input type="text" name="discipline" placeholder="e.g. Public Health, Ecology, Economics" required>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr class="form-divider">

  <!-- Section 3: R experience -->
  <div class="form-section-title">3 · R programming experience</div>

  <div class="field-group">
    <label>Current level of R proficiency <span class="req">*</span></label>
    <div class="radio-group">
      <label class="radio-option">
        <input type="radio" name="r_level" value="No experience" required>
        <div>
          <div class="opt-label">No experience</div>
          <div class="opt-desc">I have never used R before</div>
        </div>
      </label>
      <label class="radio-option">
        <input type="radio" name="r_level" value="Beginner">
        <div>
          <div class="opt-label">Beginner</div>
          <div class="opt-desc">I have tried R a few times but am not comfortable with it</div>
        </div>
      </label>
      <label class="radio-option">
        <input type="radio" name="r_level" value="Intermediate">
        <div>
          <div class="opt-label">Intermediate</div>
          <div class="opt-desc">I can run basic analyses and plots but struggle with complex tasks</div>
        </div>
      </label>
      <label class="radio-option">
        <input type="radio" name="r_level" value="Proficient">
        <div>
          <div class="opt-label">Proficient</div>
          <div class="opt-desc">I use R regularly in my research</div>
        </div>
      </label>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="field-group">
    <label>Topics you are most interested in learning <span class="req">*</span></label>
    <div class="check-group">
      <label class="check-item">
        <input type="checkbox" name="topics" value="Data wrangling (tidyverse)">
        Data import, cleaning &amp; wrangling (tidyverse)
      </label>
      <label class="check-item">
        <input type="checkbox" name="topics" value="Data visualisation (ggplot2)">
        Data visualisation (ggplot2)
      </label>
      <label class="check-item">
        <input type="checkbox" name="topics" value="Statistical analysis & modelling">
        Statistical analysis &amp; modelling
      </label>
      <label class="check-item">
        <input type="checkbox" name="topics" value="Reproducible research (R Markdown / Quarto)">
        Reproducible research (R Markdown / Quarto)
      </label>
      <label class="check-item">
        <input type="checkbox" name="topics" value="Machine learning with R">
        Machine learning with R
      </label>
      <label class="check-item">
        <input type="checkbox" name="topics" value="Bioinformatics / domain-specific packages">
        Bioinformatics / domain-specific packages
      </label>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr class="form-divider">

  <!-- Section 4: Seat category -->
  <div class="form-section-title">4 · Seat category</div>

  <div class="field-group">
    <label>Please select the seat category you are applying for <span class="req">*</span></label>
    <div class="radio-group">
      <label class="radio-option">
        <input type="radio" name="seat_type" value="Funded" onchange="toggleFunded(this)" required>
        <div>
          <div class="opt-label">Fully Funded (₹0)</div>
          <div class="opt-desc">5 seats — merit &amp; financial need based. Requires additional justification below.</div>
        </div>
      </label>
      <label class="radio-option">
        <input type="radio" name="seat_type" value="Early Bird" onchange="toggleFunded(this)">
        <div>
          <div class="opt-label">Early Bird — ₹3,600 (40% off)</div>
          <div class="opt-desc">7 seats — apply by 30 April 2026 only.</div>
        </div>
      </label>
      <label class="radio-option">
        <input type="radio" name="seat_type" value="Regular" onchange="toggleFunded(this)">
        <div>
          <div class="opt-label">Regular — ₹6,000</div>
          <div class="opt-desc">8 seats — apply by 15 June 2026.</div>
        </div>
      </label>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Funded extra (shown only when Funded is selected) -->
  <div class="funded-section" id="fundedExtra">
    <div class="funded-section-title">Additional information for fully funded seat</div>
    <div class="field-group">
      <label>Annual household income (approximate)</label>
      <select name="household_income">
        <option value="">Select…</option>
        <option>Below ₹2,00,000</option>
        <option>₹2,00,000 – ₹5,00,000</option>
        <option>₹5,00,000 – ₹10,00,000</option>
        <option>Above ₹10,00,000</option>
        <option>Prefer not to disclose</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div class="field-group">
      <label>Why do you need a fully funded seat? Describe your financial situation and how attending this school will benefit your research.</label>
      <textarea name="funded_justification"
        placeholder="Please explain in 150–300 words…" style="min-height:110px"></textarea>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr class="form-divider">

  <!-- Section 5: Motivation -->
  <div class="form-section-title">5 · Motivation &amp; research use</div>

  <div class="field-group">
    <label>Briefly describe your current research and how you plan to use R in it. <span class="req">*</span></label>
    <textarea name="research_description"
      placeholder="Describe your research and how R skills will help (150–300 words)…" required></textarea>
  </div>

  <div class="field-group">
    <label>Why do you want to attend the SARA Summer School specifically? <span class="req">*</span></label>
    <textarea name="motivation"
      placeholder="What do you hope to gain? (100–200 words)…" required></textarea>
  </div>

  <div class="field-group">
    <label>Have you attended any previous SARA course?</label>
    <div class="radio-group" style="flex-direction: row; gap: 12px;">
      <label class="radio-option" style="flex: 1;">
        <input type="radio" name="prev_attendee" value="Yes">
        <div><div class="opt-label">Yes</div></div>
      </label>
      <label class="radio-option" style="flex: 1;">
        <input type="radio" name="prev_attendee" value="No">
        <div><div class="opt-label">No</div></div>
      </label>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr class="form-divider">

  <!-- Section 6: Logistics -->
  <div class="form-section-title">6 · Logistics</div>

  <div class="field-group">
    <label>City and state you will be travelling from <span class="req">*</span></label>
    <input type="text" name="city" placeholder="e.g. Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh" required>
    <div class="hint">Travel is not reimbursed. Please confirm you can arrange your own travel to the venue.</div>
  </div>

  <!-- <div class="field-group">
    <label>Dietary requirements</label>
    <select name="dietary">
      <option value="None">No special requirements</option>
      <option>Vegetarian</option>
      <option>Vegan</option>
      <option>Jain (no root vegetables)</option>
      <option>Gluten-free</option>
      <option>Other (please specify in comments below)</option>
    </select>
  </div> -->

  <div class="field-group">
    <label>Any medical conditions or accessibility needs we should be aware of?</label>
    <textarea name="medical_notes"
      placeholder="Optional — strictly confidential, used only to make necessary arrangements."
      style="min-height: 68px"></textarea>
  </div>

  <hr class="form-divider">

  <!-- Refund policy + consent -->
  <div class="refund-box">
    <strong>Refund &amp; cancellation policy</strong>
    Cancellations made on or before <strong>30 June 2026</strong> are eligible for a
    <strong>50% refund</strong> of the fee paid. No refund will be issued for
    cancellations after this date. Fully funded seats carry no monetary refund and
    are non-transferable. By submitting this form you agree to these terms.
  </div>

  <div class="field-group">
    <label class="check-item" style="font-size: 13px; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px;">
      <input type="checkbox" name="policy_agree" required style="margin-top: 3px; flex-shrink: 0;">
      <span>I confirm that all information provided is accurate, and I agree to the
      refund and cancellation policy stated above. <span class="req">*</span></span>
    </label>
  </div>

  <div class="field-group" style="margin-top: 6px;">
    <label class="check-item" style="font-size: 13px; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px;">
      <input type="checkbox" name="comms_consent" style="margin-top: 3px; flex-shrink: 0;">
      <span>I consent to being contacted by SARA for future events and communications.</span>
    </label>
  </div>

  <!-- Hidden field: submission timestamp -->
  <input type="hidden" name="submitted_at" id="submittedAt">

  <div class="submit-area">
    <button type="submit" class="btn-submit">Submit Application</button>
    <div class="submit-note">
      You will receive a confirmation email within 48 hours of submission.
    </div>
  </div>

</form>

<!-- Success message shown after submission -->
<div class="success-msg" id="successMsg">
  <h3>✓ Application received!</h3>
  <p>Thank you for applying to the 3rd SARA Summer School.<br>
  We will write to you within 48 hours with a confirmation.<br><br>
  <a href="SARA_SS3_Announcement.html" style="color:#2e6cb0;">← Back to the announcement</a></p>
</div>

<script>
  /* ── Stamp submission time ── */
  document.getElementById('submittedAt').value = new Date().toISOString();

  /* ── Toggle funded-seat extra fields ── */
  function toggleFunded(radio) {
    const el = document.getElementById('fundedExtra');
    el.classList.toggle('show', radio.value === 'Funded');
  }


  if (!usingFormspree) {
    form.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      form.style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('successMsg').style.display = 'block';
      window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
    });
  }
</script>
```

---

<!-- > **How submissions reach you:**  
> Replace `YOUR_FORM_ID` in the `<form action="…">` tag with your [Formspree](https://formspree.io) form ID. Every submission is then emailed to you and stored in the Formspree dashboard, where you can export all responses as a **CSV** for use in `SARA_SS3_Dashboard.qmd`. If you are using Google Forms instead, embed or link to it here and remove the form block above. -->
